channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch the historic Artemis II lunar flyby
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission is about to make history. After a successful April 1 launch, and a trip of 39,000 miles through space, astronauts Reid Wiseman, Christina Koch, Victor Glover and Jeremy Hansen are about to travel farther from Earth than any human beings have before, and you can watch the entire thing unfold online. NASA will stream the entire flyby on YouTube and its own NASA+ website, with coverage beginning at 1PM ET. It's going to take some time for things to get underway, so if you're working or have plans this evening but don't want to miss seeing history being made, your best be...

item.title: The Artemis II astronauts will set a new distance record from Earth today
item.description: On April 15th, 1970, Jim Lovell, Fred Haise, and Jack Swigert set a distance record when Apollo 13 traveled 248,655 miles from Earth. Nearly 56 years later, the crew of Artemis II is expected to break that record by several thousand miles when the Orion spacecraft reaches a maximum distance of 252,757 miles away from […]

item.title: LA Has a Big Flea Problem. Typhus Cases Reached Record High Last Year
item.description: Cases of the serious bacterial disease reached a record high in the region last year. Here's how to avoid catching it.

item.title: Cet écran PC QD-OLED MSI (240 Hz et 0,03 ms) est à prix cassé chez Darty
item.description: Envie d’un nouvel écran PC pour jouer à vos jeux préférés, sans pour autant exploser votre budget ? On a ce qu’il vous faut : cette référence MSI profite d’un écran QD-OLED ultra fluide de 27 pouces dont le prix passe de 529 euros à 399 euros.

item.title: Can a MacBook Neo handle everyday work? I tested it — and it’s very good news
item.description: The MacBook Neo is pitched as the budget laptop for everyone, but can it handle real work? We have your answer.

item.title: Ce constructeur chinois veut que ses voitures électriques soient parfaitement adaptées aux clients européens
item.description: La firme chinoise Zeekr confirme que ses voitures électriques vendues en Europe bénéficieront d’un système d’infodivertissement dédié. Basé sur Android Automotive, ce système est conçu spécialement pour répondre aux besoins des clients sur le Vieux Continent.

item.title: Logitech’s haptics-enhanced MX Master 4 mouse is on sale for under $100
item.description: If you’re shopping for a wireless mouse that’ll help you multitask more easily, Logitech’s MX Master 4 is easily one of the best and most comfortable options available. It’s rarely discounted, but the black version is currently down to $99.99 ($20 off) at Newegg with code TRWF233. While it offers similarly quiet clicks and long […]

item.title: The Sonos Ace noise-cancelling headphones are $100 cheaper today only
item.description: The Sonos Ace headphones are on sale for $100 off at Amazon, just $20 away from their best price ever.

item.title: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins wants data centers in space
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Chuck Robbins, CEO of Cisco. Cisco is one of those big companies that everyone has heard of but that most of us don’t have to interact with very much; it’s not really a consumer brand. But all of us are in some way using Cisco’s products and services every day because […]

item.title: Mercedes-Benz recalls some G-Wagon EVs due to risk of wheels falling off
item.description: Before you take your electric G-Wagon for its next off-roading excursion, you may want to stop by an authorized dealer. The German automaker issued a recall for every Mercedes-Benz G580 with EQ technology with the 2025 model year, as first spotted by InsideEVs. According to the recall on the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration's website, the current wheel bolts could "allow a wheel to loosen or detach from the vehicle," potentially affecting 3,734 models on the road. The recall report explained that the electric G580's wheel bolts were "not adapted to the increased vehicle mass and ...

item.title: One of the largest corporate espionage and data breach scandals in digital history': New "BrowserGate" report claims LinkedIn secretly scans user browsers for installed extensions and collects device data
item.description: LinkedIn calls it a smear campaign, but does not deny scanning people's browsers for extensions.

item.title: Il n’y aura plus de jeux PlayStation sur PC, un changement discret le confirme
item.description: Sony a mis à jour les descriptions des studios PlayStation pour en effacer les mentions de "PC », confirmant l'arrêt des portages sur ordinateur.

item.title: ‘The Testaments’ Cast on How Their Show Mirrors Our Real-Life Dystopia
item.description: Similar to ‘The Handmaid’s Tale,’ the sequel series based on Margaret Atwood’s book has some uncomfortable parallels to current events.

item.title: Samsung's Music Studio speakers and two of its 2026 soundbars are available now
item.description: Back at CES, Samsung showed off a new line of speakers and two of its 2026 soundbars. Today, the company announced pricing for the entire suite of new products, including two soundbars that weren’t inside its showroom in Vegas. All but two of the new devices are available to order now, so you might not have to wait to get your hands on some new Samsung audio gear. Let’s start with the Music Studio 7 and Music Studio 5 speakers. The Music Studio 7 is the more rectangular model in the duo. It’s a 3.1.1-channel unit with left, right and center speakers alongside one woofer and one up-firing drive...

item.title: Meta to Smart Glasses Owners: Stop Hitting Yourself
item.description: In a video from March, Meta's CTO, Andrew Bosworth, says Ray-Ban users are "choosing" to have some of their content reviewed.

item.title: Menopause products are now everywhere. Doctors are urging women to be very skeptical
item.description: The market is currently flooded with products making big promises. Women suffering through the hot flashes, night sweats, mood changes and sleep problems that can come with menopause — all while looking in the mirror and noticing signs of aging — are being bombarded with products.More open conversations about menopause and the period leading up to it — called perimenopause — are happening at the same time that marketing has been supercharged by social media. Women are being confronted by lotions and serums and light masks that promise to rejuvenate their faces and necks, dietary supplements c...

item.title: Speed won’t win the AI era. Architecture will
item.description: Ethical AI requires deliberate design, built-in accountability, and human oversight. AI has become a race, but we’re mistaking velocity for progress.

item.title: Nintendo offers savings with new Switch 2 Super Mario Galaxy bundle
item.description: To celebrate 'The Super Mario Galaxy Movie,' Nintendo is discounting the games it's based on if you buy them with a Switch 2.

item.title: Apples new M5 MacBook Air is the cheapest its ever been at Amazon
item.description: The Apple M5 MacBook Air just dropped to its best price since last month's launch. Save $149 on both base models at Amazon.

item.title: Apple a officiellement lancé la production d’essai de son premier iPhone pliable
item.description: L'appareil concentre des années de recherche, un design book-style affiné et une ambition tarifaire assumée. Tour d'horizon de ce qui s'annonce comme l'une des sorties les plus attendues de la décennie.

item.title: Gaming Handhelds Are Getting Really Funky—and We’re Here for It
item.description: If RAM prices force us to spend more on handhelds, we should hope they can flip and fold.

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications open: A chance for VC access, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K
item.description: Nominate your startup, or one you know that deserves the spotlight, and finish the process by applying. Selected 200 have a chance at VC access, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K for Startup Battlefield 200. Applications close on May 27.

item.title: Artemis II: Everything We Know as Its Crew Approaches the Far Side of the Moon
item.description: Artemis II remains on course for its lunar flyby as the crew shares historic photos of Earth, tests key systems for future lunar missions, and attempts to fix the toilet.

item.title: This devious VENOM phishing campaign targets business executives by name — so watch what you click on
item.description: Researchers found a new phishing kit called VENOM, capable of stealing 2FA codes and access tokens.

item.title: Attention Prime members: Save 20 cents per gallon at the pump every Friday until the end of May
item.description: Amazon Prime members can save 20¢ per gallon on fuel every Friday until the end of May at bp, Amoco, and participating ampm and Thorntons gas stations.

item.title: How to use the new ChatGPT app integrations, including DoorDash, Spotify, Uber, and others
item.description: Learn how to use Spotify, Canva, Figma, Expedia, and other apps directly in ChatGPT.

item.title: Backups won’t save you from this version of ransomware
item.description: While backups continue to be essential, they no longer determine preparedness when attackers steal sensitive data and use exposure as the primary pressure point.

item.title: Netflix Wants You to Stop Yelling at It About ‘Steel Ball Run’
item.description: After a few weeks of hesitant statements, the streamer promises the latest 'JoJo's Bizarre Adventure' anime will return this fall, and with a weekly release schedule.

item.title: Ticket savings of up to $500 this week for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: Starting today, you have 5 days to save nearly $500 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. This offer disappears Friday, April 10, at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here to secure these low rates.

item.title: How to watch I'm A Celebrity 2026 online for free — stream the All-stars spin-off from South Africa
item.description: Here's how to watch I'm A Celebrity 2026 online for free and from anywhere as Ant and Dec head to South Africa. Streaming guide and watch free with this info

item.title: Xiaomi 17 Ultra vs Xiaomi 15 Ultra : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone haut de gamme Xiaomi ?
item.description: On vous assure que ce n'est pas une faute de frappe : le Xiaomi 17 Ultra succède bien au Xiaomi 15 Ultra, et accentue encore davantage tous les efforts de la marque au niveau de la photo et de l'autonomie. Quel modèle faut-il choisir en 2026 ?
